title: Delosperma oehleri
taxonomy: Delosperma oehleri is classified within the family Aizoaceae. This family is commonly known as the ice plant family or the succulent carpet family. The genus Delosperma itself is a group of small, flowering succulents native to Southern Africa. It is a low-growing, spreading groundcover often used in landscaping for its vibrant flowers and drought tolerance.

intro: Delosperma oehleri, commonly known as a type of daisy or ice plant, is a succulent perennial plant native to the Western Cape province of South Africa. The leaves and stems of Delosperma oehleri are known for their potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to soothe skin irritations and protect against cell damage.
